---
title: "SLAM Metabolic Class Supplemental Figures"
author: "..."
data: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
geometry:
  - top=1in
  - bottom=1in
  - left=0.5in
  - right=0.5in
---

```{r sup figs setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(helphlme)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggplotify)
library(sjPlot)
library(lme4)
library(cowplot)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(consoler)
library(flextable)
library(future)
library(future.apply)
library(magick)
set.seed(365)

# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)
```

```{r sup figs read input yaml}
# this loads in all the tables
all_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
fb6_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
fhet3_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
mb6_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
mhet3_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
het3_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"
itp_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/itp_c10c11c13c16_age_controls_bw/workspace.RDATA"
held_out_path <- "../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/workspace.RDATA"

config <- NULL
```

```{r sup figs load models, include = FALSE}
# Define a named list of input paths and environment names
render_tasks <- list(
  all_env = all_path,
  fb6_env = fb6_path,
  fhet3_env = fhet3_path,
  mb6_env = mb6_path,
  mhet3_env = mhet3_path,
  het3_env = het3_path,
  itp_env = itp_path,
  held_out_env = held_out_path
)

lapply(names(render_tasks), function(env_name) {
  env <- new.env()
  input_path <- render_tasks[[env_name]]
  load(input_path, envir = env)
  assign(env_name, env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
})
```

```{r annotate figure function}
annotate_figure_label <- function(image_obj, label) {
  magick::image_annotate(
    image_obj,
    text = toupper(label),
    size = 50,
    gravity = "northwest",
    location = "+20+20",
    color = "black"
  )
}
```

```{r save figure function}
save_figure <- function(image_obj, fig_num, label) {
  dir_path <- file.path("output", "supplemental", paste0("fig", fig_num))
  file_path <- file.path(dir_path, paste0(fig_num, label, ".png"))

  if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) {
    dir.create(dir_path, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  magick::image_write(image_obj, path = file_path, format = "png")
}
```

```{r grob to magick}
grob_to_magick <- function(grob, width = 400, height = 400, res = 150) {
  tf <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  png(tf, width = width, height = height, res = res)
  grid::grid.newpage()
  grid::grid.draw(grob)
  dev.off()
  image_read(tf)
}
```

```{r sup figs fig no }
fig_no <- 1
tab_no <- 1
max_width <- 7
```

\newpage

\tableofcontents


\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Sex/Strain Classes FM

```{r sex strain fat classes, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/fatfat.png")
fig$B <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/fatkm.png")
fig$C <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/fatfat.png")
fig$D <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/fatkm.png")
fig$E <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/fatfat.png")
fig$F <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/fatkm.png")
fig$G <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/fatfat.png")
fig$H <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/fatkm.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

cbind_hr_table <- function(strata, hr_table) {
  cbind(sex_strain = strata, Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
}

hr_table <- rbind(
  cbind_hr_table("fb6", fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mb6", mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("fhet3", fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mhet3", mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]])
)
rownames(hr_table) <- NULL

hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$I <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$I <- image_scale(fig$I, "400%")
fig$I <- image_border(fig$I, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$I <- annotate_figure_label(fig$I, "I")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/fatfat_legend.png")
legend2 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/fatfat_legend.png")
legend3 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/fatfat_legend.png")
legend4 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/fatfat_legend.png")

row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, legend1, fig$C, fig$D, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, legend3, fig$G, fig$H, legend4), stack = FALSE)

final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, fig$I), stack = TRUE)

final_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Sex/Strain Classes FBG

```{r sex strain gluc classes, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/glucgluc.png")
fig$B <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/gluckm.png")
fig$C <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/glucgluc.png")
fig$D <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/gluckm.png")
fig$E <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/glucgluc.png")
fig$F <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/gluckm.png")
fig$G <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/glucgluc.png")
fig$H <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/gluckm.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

cbind_hr_table <- function(strata, hr_table) {
  cbind(sex_strain = strata, Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
}

hr_table <- rbind(
  cbind_hr_table("fb6", fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mb6", mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("fhet3", fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]]),
  cbind_hr_table("mhet3", mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr[[1]])
)
rownames(hr_table) <- NULL

hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$I <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$I <- image_scale(fig$I, "400%")
fig$I <- image_border(fig$I, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$I <- annotate_figure_label(fig$I, "I")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fb6_env/define_class/glucgluc_legend.png")
legend2 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mb6_env/define_class/glucgluc_legend.png")
legend3 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/fhet3_env/define_class/glucgluc_legend.png")
legend4 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/mhet3_env/define_class/glucgluc_legend.png")

row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, legend1, fig$C, fig$D, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, legend3, fig$G, fig$H, legend4), stack = FALSE)

final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, fig$I), stack = TRUE)

final_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage


### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Heatmaps

```{r heatmaps, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/heatmap/heatmap2.jpg")
fig$B <- image_read("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/heatmap/heatmap1.jpg")
fig$C <- image_read("../97_partial_correlation/output/partial_correlation_network.jpg")
fig$D <- image_read("../97_partial_correlation/output/partial_correlation_results_clean_table.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$C, fig$D), stack = FALSE)

final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2), stack = TRUE)

final_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Reclassifcation analysis

```{r sup reclassifcation analysis, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/class_prediction_panel/class_prediction_panel.png")
fig$A <- image_read("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/class_prediction_panel/class_prediction_panel.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Reclassification.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

final_panel <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$M), stack = TRUE)

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Internal Validation

```{r sup internal validation, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("images/Internal Validation.png")
fig$B <- image_read("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/forest/plot_2.png")
fig$C <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/window_coef.png")
fig$D <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/cum_coef.png")
fig$E <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/window_concord.png")
fig$F <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/cum_concord.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

fig$A <- image_scale(fig$A, "75%")
fig$B <- image_scale(fig$B, "125%")


legend1 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/window_coef_legend.png")
legend2 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/cum_coef_legend.png")
legend3 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/window_concord_legend.png")
legend4 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/all_env/validation/cum_concord_legend.png")

# Stack the rows vertically
row1 <- fig$A
row2 <- fig$B
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$C, legend1, fig$D, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$E, legend3, fig$F, legend4), stack = FALSE)

final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: External Validation

```{r sup external validation, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("images/External Validation.png")
fig$B <- image_read("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/forest/plot_2.png")
fig$C <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/window_coef.png")
fig$D <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/cum_coef.png")
fig$E <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/window_concord.png")
fig$F <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/cum_concord.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

fig$A <- image_scale(fig$A, "75%")
fig$B <- image_scale(fig$B, "125%")

legend1 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/window_coef_legend.png")
legend2 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/cum_coef_legend.png")
legend3 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/window_concord_legend.png")
legend4 <- image_read("../96_pub_ready_figs/output/held_out_env/validation/cum_concord_legend.png")

# Stack the rows vertically
row1 <- fig$A
row2 <- fig$B
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$C, legend1, fig$D, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$E, legend3, fig$F, legend4), stack = FALSE)

final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: External Validation KM

```{r sup external validation km, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 19.5]_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 32.5]_2.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 45.5]_3.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 58.5]_4.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 71.5]_5.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 84.5]_6.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 97.5]_7.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 110.5]_8.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 123.5]_9.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 136.5]_10.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

hr_table <- held_out_env$save_figtabs$km_hr_combine_validation_panels_hr
hr_table <- lapply(hr_table, function(table) {
  table <- cbind(Tertile = seq_len(nrow(table)) + 1, table)
  table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(table), table)
  table$column <- rep(colnames(table)[3], nrow(table))
  colnames(table)[3] <- "HR"
  rownames(table) <- NULL
  table
})
hr_table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- hr_table[1:10]
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/km_external_validation_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$K <- image_read("output/km_external_validation_panel_hr.png")
fig$K <- image_scale(fig$K, "200%")
fig$K <- image_border(fig$K, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$K <- annotate_figure_label(fig$K, "K")

# Manually define rows (3 per row, last row only 1 image)
rows <- list(
  image_append(image_join(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$D, fig$E, fig$F)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$G, fig$H, fig$I)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$J, fig$K))
)

# Stack rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(image_join(rows), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Information

```{r sup figs michel}
fig <- list()
knitr::include_graphics("images/Michel Healthcard.png")
fig$A <- image_read("images/Michel Healthcard.png")
for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Sex/Strain Adjusted Hazards

```{r sex strain adjusted hazards, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Linear Mixed Effects Models

```{r linear mixed effect, results = 'asis'}
lme_coef_table <- all_env$save_figtabs$lme_coef_table_broom
lme_coef_table <- lapply(lme_coef_table, function(table) {
  table <- table %>%
    mutate(across(ends_with("p.value"), ~ case_when(
      .x < 0.0001 ~ "< 0.0001",
      .x < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
      .x < 0.01 ~ "< 0.01",
      .x < 0.05 ~ "< 0.05",
      TRUE ~ "-"
    )))
  return(table)
})

# Function to alternate estimate and p.value columns
reorder_estimate_pvalue <- function(df) {
  term_col <- "term"
  all_cols <- names(df)
  prefixes <- unique(gsub(
    "_(estimate|p.value)$", "",
    all_cols[!all_cols %in% term_col]
  ))
  new_order <- c(term_col, unlist(lapply(prefixes, function(prefix) {
    c(paste0(prefix, "_estimate"), paste0(prefix, "_p.value"))
  })))

  df[, new_order]
}

# Apply to each table in your list
lme_coef_table <- lapply(lme_coef_table, reorder_estimate_pvalue)

lme_coef_table <- lapply(lme_coef_table, function(table) {
  flextable(table) %>%
    theme_vanilla() %>%
    autofit() %>%
    set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
    fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)
})

lme_coef_table[[1]]
lme_coef_table[[2]]
lme_coef_table[[3]]

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```


\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Descriptive Statistics SLAM C1-C10 datasets

```{r sup_tables dataset info complete and training, results = 'asis'}
flextable(rbind(
  all_env$save_figtabs$sum_data,
  all_env$save_figtabs$sum_test
)) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```



\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Median Life Expectancy Data

```{r sup_tables census information, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$table_mle) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LCM Model Information

```{r sup_tables lcmm concise, results = 'asis'}
all_env$save_figtabs$lcmm_table %>%
  dplyr::rename(`Smallest Class %` = `Smallest.Class....`) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(`Smallest Class %` = round(`Smallest Class %`, digits = 3)) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

# Back Pocket

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Treatment Response

```{r treatment response, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/99_treatment_response/output/treatment_response/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/99_treatment_response/output/treatment_response/plot_2.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/99_treatment_response/output/treatment_response/plot_3.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C), stack = FALSE)

load("../99_treatment_response/output/hr_table/hr_table.RDATA")

do.call(rbind, hrs_table) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Defining Metabolic Classes - HET3

```{r define classes het3, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_4.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_7.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_10.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_2.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_5.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_8.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_11.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_3.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_6.png")
fig$K <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_9.png")
fig$L <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_het3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_12.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Basic LCM.png")


for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

# create table
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, het3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$N <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$N <- image_scale(fig$N, "400%")
fig$N <- image_border(fig$N, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$N <- annotate_figure_label(fig$N, "N")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- grob_to_magick(het3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[1]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend2 <- grob_to_magick(het3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[2]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend3 <- grob_to_magick(het3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[3]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")


# Build rows of 4 images
row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C, fig$D, legend1), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, fig$G, fig$H, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$I, fig$J, fig$K, fig$L, legend3), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$M, fig$N))
# Stack the rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Defining Metabolic Classes - Female B6

```{r define classes fb6, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_4.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_7.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_10.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_2.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_5.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_8.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_11.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_3.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_6.png")
fig$K <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_9.png")
fig$L <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_12.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Basic LCM.png")


for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

# create table
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, fb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$N <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$N <- image_scale(fig$N, "400%")
fig$N <- image_border(fig$N, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$N <- annotate_figure_label(fig$N, "N")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- grob_to_magick(fb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[1]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend2 <- grob_to_magick(fb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[2]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend3 <- grob_to_magick(fb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[3]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")


# Build rows of 4 images
row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C, fig$D, legend1), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, fig$G, fig$H, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$I, fig$J, fig$K, fig$L, legend3), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$M, fig$N))
# Stack the rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Defining Metabolic Classes - Female HET3

```{r define classes fhet3, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_4.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_7.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_10.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_2.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_5.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_8.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_11.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_3.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_6.png")
fig$K <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_9.png")
fig$L <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_12.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Basic LCM.png")


for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

# create table
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, fhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$N <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$N <- image_scale(fig$N, "400%")
fig$N <- image_border(fig$N, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$N <- annotate_figure_label(fig$N, "N")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- grob_to_magick(fhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[1]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend2 <- grob_to_magick(fhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[2]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend3 <- grob_to_magick(fhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[3]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")


# Build rows of 4 images
row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C, fig$D, legend1), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, fig$G, fig$H, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$I, fig$J, fig$K, fig$L, legend3), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$M, fig$N))
# Stack the rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Defining Metabolic Classes - Male B6

```{r define classes mb6, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_4.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_7.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_10.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_2.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_5.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_8.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_11.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_3.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_6.png")
fig$K <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_9.png")
fig$L <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_12.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Basic LCM.png")


for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

# create table
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, mb6_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$N <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$N <- image_scale(fig$N, "400%")
fig$N <- image_border(fig$N, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$N <- annotate_figure_label(fig$N, "N")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- grob_to_magick(mb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[1]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend2 <- grob_to_magick(mb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[2]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend3 <- grob_to_magick(mb6_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[3]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")


# Build rows of 4 images
row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C, fig$D, legend1), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, fig$G, fig$H, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$I, fig$J, fig$K, fig$L, legend3), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$M, fig$N))
# Stack the rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage


### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Defining Metabolic Classes - Male HET3

```{r define classes mhet3, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_4.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_7.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_10.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_2.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_5.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_8.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_11.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_3.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_6.png")
fig$K <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_9.png")
fig$L <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc/outcome/plot_12.png")
fig$M <- image_read("images/Basic LCM.png")


for (label in names(fig)) {
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

# create table
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, mhet3_env$save_figtabs$mortality_panel_hr)
hr_table <- cbind(Class = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/mortality_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$N <- image_read("output/mortality_panel_hr.png")
fig$N <- image_scale(fig$N, "400%")
fig$N <- image_border(fig$N, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$N <- annotate_figure_label(fig$N, "N")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
}

legend1 <- grob_to_magick(mhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[1]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend2 <- grob_to_magick(mhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[2]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")
legend3 <- grob_to_magick(mhet3_env$save_figtabs$legends_only[[3]]) %>%
  image_scale("200%")


# Build rows of 4 images
row1 <- image_append(c(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C, fig$D, legend1), stack = FALSE)
row2 <- image_append(c(fig$E, fig$F, fig$G, fig$H, legend2), stack = FALSE)
row3 <- image_append(c(fig$I, fig$J, fig$K, fig$L, legend3), stack = FALSE)
row4 <- image_append(c(fig$M, fig$N))
# Stack the rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(c(row1, row2, row3, row4), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel
# image_write(final_panel, "output/fig/panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Internal Validation KM

```{r sup internal validation km, out.width = "100%"}
fig <- list()
fig$A <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 19.5]_1.png")
fig$B <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 32.5]_2.png")
fig$C <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 45.5]_3.png")
fig$D <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 58.5]_4.png")
fig$E <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 71.5]_5.png")
fig$F <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 84.5]_6.png")
fig$G <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 97.5]_7.png")
fig$H <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 110.5]_8.png")
fig$I <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 123.5]_9.png")
fig$J <- image_read("/Users/williammueller/programs/metabolic_class/analysis/07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/km_combined_hr_validation/plot_[6.5, 136.5]_10.png")

for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

hr_table <- all_env$save_figtabs$km_hr_combine_validation_panels_hr
hr_table <- lapply(hr_table, function(table) {
  table <- cbind(Tertile = seq_len(nrow(table)) + 1, table)
  table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(table), table)
  table$column <- rep(colnames(table)[3], nrow(table))
  colnames(table)[3] <- "HR"
  rownames(table) <- NULL
  table
})
hr_table <- cbind(explicit = rownames(hr_table), hr_table)
hr_table <- hr_table[1:10]
hr_table <- do.call(rbind, hr_table)
hr_table <- flextable(hr_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

invisible(save_as_image(hr_table, "output/km_internal_validation_panel_hr.png", zoom = 10))
fig$K <- image_read("output/km_internal_validation_panel_hr.png")
fig$K <- image_scale(fig$K, "200%")
fig$K <- image_border(fig$K, color = "white", geometry = "100x100")
fig$K <- annotate_figure_label(fig$K, "K")

# Manually define rows (3 per row, last row only 1 image)
rows <- list(
  image_append(image_join(fig$A, fig$B, fig$C)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$D, fig$E, fig$F)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$G, fig$H, fig$I)),
  image_append(image_join(fig$J, fig$K))
)

# Stack rows vertically
final_panel <- image_append(image_join(rows), stack = TRUE)

# View or save
final_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Individual Cox Information

```{r sup_tables table coxzph individual cox model, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$individual_coxzph_tables) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Combined Cox Information

```{r sup_tables table coxzph combined cox model, results = 'asis'}
all_env$save_figtabs$combined_coxzph_tables %>%
  mutate(df = round(df, digits = 2)) %>%
  select(-outcome) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

# Extended Supplemental

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: How it works

```{r sup figs how it works, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/how_it_works/how_it_works.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Kaplan Meier by Harmonizer

```{r sup figs kap plot by harmonize, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/harmonize_km/plot_1.png")

table <- all_env$save_figtabs$harmonize_km[[1]]
table <- cbind(Cohort = rownames(table), table)
flextable(table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
rm(table)
```

\newpage

```{r sup figs heights and widths}
pred_obs_height <- nrow(all_env$final_models) / 2 * 6
unique_class <- unique(all_env$final_models$census[[1]]$class)
dose_height_width <- sqrt(length(unique_class)) * 6
```

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: KM plots of covariates - By Sex

```{r sup figs plot km covs sex, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/cov_km/plot_1.png")

table <- all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[1]]
table <- cbind(Sex = rownames(table), table)
flextable(table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
rm(table)
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: KM plots of covariates - By Strain

```{r sup figs plot km covs strain, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/cov_km/plot_2.png")

table <- all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[2]]
table <- cbind(Strain = rownames(table), table)
flextable(table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
rm(table)
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of Outcome Variables - Complete and Training Data

```{r sup figs disply hist outcome panel, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/hist_outcome_plot_panel/hist_outcome_plot_panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of log transform of outcome Variables - Complete and Training Data

```{r sup figs disply hist log outcome panel, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/hist_log_outcome_plot_panel/hist_log_outcome_plot_panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of probability of class membership - Complete Data

```{r sup figs disply hist class prob panel, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/hist_plot_panel/hist_plot_panel.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Cumulative

```{r sup figs cumulative validation plots, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/cum_validation_plots/cum_validation_plots.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Window

```{r sup figs window validation plots, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/window_validation_plots/window_validation_plots.png")
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Interval

```{r sup figs interval validation plots, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/interval_validation_plots/interval_validation_plots.png")
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Proportion Resampled


```{r sup figs resampled validation plots, out.width = "100%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../07_display_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc/resampled_validation_plots/resampled_validation_plots.png")

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Descriptive Census Information

```{r sup_tables describe prob class, results = 'asis'}
flextable(round(all_env$save_figtabs$describe_census, digits = 3)) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Descriptive Statistics SLAM C16-C18 datasets

```{r sup_tables held_out dataset info complete and training, results = 'asis'}
flextable(held_out_env$save_figtabs$sum_test) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Missing Data Descriptive Statistics SLAM C1-C10 datasets

```{r sup_tables dataset info missing complete and training, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$sum_missing) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LCM Posterior Probabilities

```{r sup_tables lcmm model average posterior probs, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$post_prob_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Candidate LCMs

```{r sup_tables compare all models, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$all_models_table) %>%
  # fontsize(size = 3, part = "all") %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LME Information

```{r sup_tables lme table}
all_env$save_figtabs$lme_table %>%
  mutate(sigma = round(sigma, digits = 3)) %>%
  mutate(loglik = round(loglik, digits = 0)) %>%
  mutate(AICtab = round(AICtab, digits = 0)) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit") %>%
  fit_to_width(max_width = max_width, inc = .25, max_iter = 100)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 1

```{r sup figs hc1 }
fig <- list()
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 1.jpg")
fig$A <- image_read("images/HC Suppl 1.jpg")
for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 2

```{r sup figs hc2 }
fig <- list()
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 2.jpg")
fig$A <- image_read("images/HC Suppl 2.jpg")
for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 3

```{r sup figs hc3 }
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 3.jpg")
fig$A <- image_read("images/HC Suppl 3.jpg")
for (label in names(fig)) {
  save_figure(fig[[label]], as.character(fig_no), label) # Save with correct label
  fig[[label]] <- annotate_figure_label(fig[[label]], label) # Annotate
}
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage
